extension.description: Addon Kodish Store Onimatrix DX a versão permite instalar addons da Kodish e seus Parceiros Agora com Suporte ao Kodi 20/21
Mixcloud is re-thinking radio. Listen to great radio shows, Podcasts and DJ mix sets on-demand.
Mixcloud herdefinieerd radio. Luister naar uitstekende radioshows, podcasts en dj sets on demand.
Mixcloud redéfinit la radio. Écoutez les émissions radio, podcasts et mixes DJ sur demande.
Mixcloud erfindet Radio neu. Höre Radioshows, Podcasts und DJ Mixe wann immer Du willst.
extension.news: v3.0.4 (2023-10-08) Fixed broken Addon (Fix by Darionis)

extension.description: MP3 Streams Kodi 19+
extension.news: 2025.0.1 - Fix Billboard Charts, 2022.0.2 - Fix errors loading pages. 2022.0.1 - Small fix, Kodi 20 ready. 2021.0.6 - Fixed issue with hanging when skipping tracks. 2021.0.4 - Fixed Settings, 2021.0.3 - Bugfixes. Enjoy!

extension.description: Add-on to access broadcast streams provided by Radio.de.
extension.disclaimer: This add-on is not endorsed, certified or otherwise approved in any way by Radio.de. Use at your own risk.

extension.description: Read your pdf's through Kodi.
This script enables all addons that are disabled.

extension.summary: Organización y personalización avanzada de favoritos
Advanced organization and customization of favorites
Organização e personalização avançada de favoritos
Organisation avancée et personnalisation des favoris
Erweiterte Organisation und Anpassung von Favoriten
Organizzazione avanzata e personalizzazione dei preferiti
extension.description: Flow FavManager mejora la experiencia de gestión de favoritos en Kodi. Permite organizarlos, personalizar su apariencia y las acciones que realizan. Incluye herramientas de copia de seguridad, un editor intuitivo, perfiles y ordenación por secciones, entre otras funciones.

Flow FavManager improves the favorites management experience in Kodi. It allows you to organize them, customize their appearance and the actions they perform. Includes backup tools, an intuitive editor, profiles and sorting by sections, among other functions.

Flow FavManager melhora a experiência de gerenciamento de favoritos no Kodi. Permite organizá-los, personalizar sua aparência e as ações que realizam. Inclui ferramentas de backup, um editor intuitivo, perfis e classificação por seções, entre outras funções.

Flow FavManager améliore l'expérience de gestion des favoris dans Kodi. Il permet de les organiser, de personnaliser leur apparence et les actions qu'ils effectuent. Comprend des outils de sauvegarde, un éditeur intuitif, des profils et un tri par sections, entre autres fonctions.

Flow FavManager verbessert das Favoriten-Management-Erlebnis in Kodi. Es ermöglicht Ihnen, sie zu organisieren, ihr Aussehen und die Aktionen, die sie ausführen, anzupassen. Beinhaltet Backup-Tools, einen intuitiven Editor, Profile und Sortierung nach Abschnitten, unter anderem.

Flow FavManager migliora l'esperienza di gestione dei preferiti in Kodi. Consente di organizzarli, personalizzarne l'aspetto e le azioni che eseguono. Include strumenti di backup, un editor intuitivo, profili e ordinamento per sezioni, tra le altre funzioni.

extension.news:
[COLOR lavender][B]Order Favourites[/B][/COLOR] [B]1.2.3:[/B] - Add-on metadata update with an icon fix.
[B]1.2.2:[/B] - Ported the improvements from the Leia version to the Matrix version.
[B]1.2.1:[/B] - Renamed "Save and exit" to "Save and reload", makes it clearer. - Added "Save and exit". Use this when save + reload happens to crash your Kodi. After saving, restart Kodi manually to see the changes. - Experimental Matrix version now available.
[B]1.2.0:[/B] - Fixed a case when the add-on failed to read the favourites file because of Unicode strings. (Thanks to [I]msauers[/I] for the report.) - Changed the label and description of the 'Restart...' button to 'Restore...', which is clearer.
[B]1.1.1:[/B] - Added menu items for a more traditional add-on UX. - Improved the profile reloading process.
[B]1.1.0:[/B] - Improved the profile reloading process, it was crashing on Kodi 17.6.
[B]1.0.4:[/B] - Safer handling of unicode text. - Optimizations, simplified the code even more.
[B]1.0.3:[/B] - Added a proper custom dialog interface. - Greatly simplified the code, much faster to use.
[B]1.0.2:[/B] - Fix for when the favorite item has unicode text.
extension.description: Lets you reorder the entries in your Favourites. Use this to organize your Favourites.

extension.summary: Put all your favourites bits of all your favourites addons into one easy to use addon.
extension.description: Super Favourites is a better way of managing your Kodi Favourites.[CR][CR]Virtually any menu item within Kodi can be added to Super Favourites, even from addons that don't normally provide this feature.[CR][CR]Super Favourites allows you to better manage your Kodi favourites, including the creation of sub-folders, into which your Kodi favourites can then be copied or moved into.[CR][CR]This allows you to create you own custom addon with just the best bits of your favourite addons. Search your favourite addons, play your favourite music, read your favourite comic strips, select your favourite playlists, browse your favourite movies, listen to your favourite radio stations, watch your favourite cartoons, the possibilities are endless, all from within one easy to use addon.
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 2, June 1991
extension.news:
2.0.10: 6 June 2021 - Fixed bug that prevented Hebrew language for working
2.0.9: 15 May 2021 - Fixed bug in Player.def activateWindowCommand(cmd) that was messing up the ability to return from child direrctories
2.0.8: 14 May 2021 - Fixed various incompatibilities with latest version of Matrix involving decode('utf-8') that caused crashes.
2.0.7: 17 February 2021 - Fixed remote folder access via another plugin
2.0.6: 11 January 2021 - Fixed access to local folders and smb folders
2.0.5: 12 December 2020 - More Fixes for Network Folder Failure to Launch
2.0.0: 29 November 2020 - Matrix Version
1.0.60: 1 November 2020 - Fixed launch issues in Kodi Leia
1.0.59: 29th May 2017 - 'Now playing' text now defined by SF due to skin variations

extension.description: Metal Concerts and Videos from YouTube. You need YouTube Addon and setup your API KEY on the Youtube Addon or Duff-You addon (no need API KEY). You can change the addon to use in Settings (YouTube or Duff-You). Thanks to Iron Butterfly, TitanKodi and Bad-Max from "Aprendiendo Kodi" group Telegram. If you want collaborate, join to the "Metal on Metal Kodi Addon" Telegram Goup.
Ahora puedes entrar en ajustes del addon y seleccionar si lo abres con youtube (apis), o con duffyou (sin apis),todo el contenido esta basado en youtube
Chaturbate streaming for Kodi 20+
Chaturbate streaming für Kodi 20+
extension.disclaimer: (c) 2025 aitschti
(c) 2025 aitschti

extension.description: Der Name sagt alles!
extension.disclaimer: Diese Software steht unter der GNU General Public License version 2[CR][CR]Copyright (c) 2014-2017 by LivingOn <LivingOn@xmail.net>
extension.description: The name says it all!
extension.disclaimer: This software is licensed under the GNU General Public License version 2[CR][CR]Copyright (c) 2014-2017 by <LivingOn@xmail.net>

extension.description: You are tired of Youtube apikeys? And watching the videos on the platform as maximum quality only up to 720p? [CR] Well, it's over! From our bar we present a new YouTube addon, where no APIKEY is needed, nor is there any kind of restriction to watch the videos at the highest quality offered, 720p, 1080p, 2K and 4K![CR]All this and much more plus...

Hasta las narices de las apikeys de YouTube? Y de ver como calidad máxima los videos de la plataforma solo hasta 720p?[CR]Pues se acabó! Desde nuestra taberna os presentamos un nuevo addon de YouTube, donde no hace falta APIKEY alguna, ni tampoco hay ningún tipo de restricción para ver los videos a la máxima calidad ofrecida, 720p, 1080p, 2K y 4K![CR]Todo esto y mucho mas...
extension.disclaimer: This is free [COLOR red][B]software[/B][/COLOR][CR][COLOR red][B]But it is not allowed[/B][/COLOR] to be distributed pre-installed on any type of device nor its total or partial inclusion in any software and/or hardware package for which the end user must [COLOR red][B]pay or make a donation[/B][/COLOR], for its acquisition, for its use or for receiving assistance.[CR]If you believe that any of these rules is not being followed, please contact us.

Este es un software [COLOR red][B]gratuito[/B][/COLOR][CR][COLOR red][B]Pero no se permite[/B][/COLOR] su distribuición preinstalada en ningún tipo de dispositivo ni tampoco su inclusión total o parcial en cualquier paquete de software y/o hardware por el que el usuario final deba [COLOR red][B]pagar o hacer una donación[/B][/COLOR], por su adquisición, por su uso o por recibir asistencia.[CR]Si cree que alguna de estas normas no se está cumpliendo póngase en contacto con nosotros.
extension.news: - Añadida opción de reproducción externa de playlists[CR]- Correcciones menores

extension.description: Empflix.com features a variety of adult videos. This addon contains explicit adult material. You may only view this addon if you are at least 18 years of age, or at least the age of majority in the jurisdiction where you reside or from which you access this content. If you do not meet these requirements, then you do not have permission to use this addon. All content is hosted by empflix.com.
extension.disclaimer: The author does not host or distribute any of the content displayed by this addon. The author does not have any affiliation with the content provider.

extension.summary: Fantasti.cc - Browse videos from a site that aggregates the best porn videos online using the votes of users as the deciding factor
extension.description: Browse collections (user designed categories) as well as the most popular videos today/week/month as decided by the users of the site

extension.description: Sports

Sportovní přenosy z různých zdrojů:
ČT4 Sport Plus (ČT4 Sport + extra přenosy) TVcom.cz (živé přenosy i archiv různých sportů a soutěží) Huste.tv (živé přenosy i archiv ze slovenských soutěží) Volej.tv (přenosy volejbalových soutěží) Ping-pong.tv (přenosy ze soutěží stolního tenisu) Tipos.sk (přenosy slovenského basketbalu)
extension.news:
v1.1.4 (22.1.2025) - přidání Tipos.sk
v1.1.3 (14.1.2025) - úprava přehrávání ČT4 Sport/Plus
v1.1.1/2 (5.1.2025) - odstranění Ettu.tv a Niké.sk - přidání live streamů pro Volej.tv
v1.1.0 (30.12.2024) - ošetření nedostupnosti webu (ettu.tv)
v1.0.9 (14.8.2024) - přepsání Volej.tv po úpravě webu

extension.description: SrRegio 5.0
Kodi Stalker client for accessing on demand videos and channels from Stalker middleware
Kodi Stalker client for accessing on demand videos and channels from Stalker middleware
extension.news:
v0.0.7 (2024-06-10) - Bug fix
v0.0.6 (2024-03-28) - Bug fix
v0.0.5 (2024-03-23) - Fix for portals with no stalker_portal in context path Please try re-entering the server address based on the format provided if it does not work after upgrading to v0.0.5 https://github.com/rickeylohia/plugin.video.stalkervod/issues/12
v0.0.4 (2024-01-20) - Refactor, debug logs and fix for https://github.com/rickeylohia/plugin.video.stalkervod/issues/10
v0.0.3 (2024-01-05) - Minor bug fixes and highlight favorites
v0.0.2 (2023-12-27) - Add favorites context menu option and re-use existing token if possible
v0.0.1 (2023-10-22) - Initial Release

extension.description: STB Plus für den Zugriff auf Videos und Vod-Demand-Kanäle und -Serien[B]Hinweis:[/B] Wir weisen darauf hin, dass die Nutzung von mancher Addons in bestimmten Ländern gegen geltendes Recht verstoßen kann und strafbar ist. Die Verantwortung für die Anwendung dieser Addons liegt ausschließlich beim jeweiligen Benutzer. Wir übernimmt daher keinerlei Haftung für etwaige rechtliche Konsequenzen. Eine Weitergabe der Addons an Dritte oder nicht autorisierte Personen ist strengstens untersagt. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis!!!!
extension.news: Major Update: - Zappen nun möglich – Neues STB Plus-Hauptmenü – Download von Filme und Serien – Erweiterte EPG-Darstellung inkl. Auto-Refresh beim Start – DACH-Filter für gezielte Sender- und Inhaltsauswahl – Optimierte Navigation und Caching

Извлича информация от вашето меню "Любими" и показва допълнителни бутони в главното меню и подменюто.
Obtenir els temes Preferits dels seus Kodi per omplir el menú Inici / submenú amb botons personalitzats.
Přenese položky z Oblíbených do Home menu/submenu pod vlastní tlačítka.
Henter elementer fra din Kodi-favoritter til at fylde Hjemmemenu/undermenu med brugerbestemte knapper.
Stellt die Einträge aus der Kodi-Favoriten-Liste für benutzerdefinierte Verknüpfungen auf dem Startbildschirm zur Verfügung.
Χρησιμοποιεί αντικείμενα από τα αγαπημένα σας του Kodi για να συμπληρώσει τα προσαρμοσμένα πλήκτρα μενού/υπομενού της Αρχικής Οθόνης
Fetches item from your Kodi favourites to populate Home menu/submenu with custom buttons.
Fetches item from your Kodi favourites to populate Home menu/submenu with custom buttons.
Fetches item from your Kodi favorites to populate Home menu/submenu with custom buttons.
Usar ítems de tus favoritos de Kodi para crear menús y submenús personalizados
Obtiene medios de sus favoritos en Kodi para enriquecer su menu inicio y sub carpetas con botones personalizados
Hakee Kodin suosikeista kohteita ja populoi sillä Koti-valikon / alivalikon muokatuilla napeilla.
Récupère l'élément depuis les favoris Kodi pour remplir le menu/sous-menu de la page d'accueil avec des boutons personnalisés.
Récupère l'élément de vos favoris Kodi pour remplir le menu d'accueil/le sous-menu avec des boutons personnalisés.
Obtén o elemento dos favoritos para estabelecer botóns personalizados no Menú Principal/Submenú
מייבא פריט מהמועדפים שלך לאכלוס תפריט/תת תפריט עם לחצנים מותאמים אישית במסך הבית.
Dohvaća stavke iz vašeg Kodi 'Omiljeno' izbornika i popunjava Početni izbornik/podizbornik s prilagođenim tipkama.
Összegyűjti az elemeket az Kodi kedvencek közül és a központi menü almenüjébe helyezi egyedi gombokkal.
Ambil item dari favorit Kodi Anda untuk mengisi menu/submenu Beranda dengan tombol suka-suka.
Preleva elementi dai tuoi preferiti per popolare il menù principale ed i sottomenù con bottoni personalizzato.
Kodi 즐겨찾기에서 항목을 가져와 사용자 설정 버튼으로 홈 메뉴/서브메뉴에 표시합니다.
Paima elementus iš Kodi mėgstamiausiųjų, kad užpildytų pagrindinio meniu/submeniu individualiais mygtukais.
Haalt item van je Kodi favorieten op om in het Home menu/submenu te plaatsen via losse buttons.
Henter oppføringer fra favorittene dine i Kodi for å befolke hovedmenyen og undermenyen med egendefinerte knapper.
Pobiera pozycje z twoich ulubionych w celu zapełnienia menu/podmenu niestandardowymi przyciskami.
Obtém itens dos seus favoritos do Kodi para povoar o Menu Principal/submenu com botões personalizados.
Compila itens dos seus favoritos do Kodi para ocupar menus e submenus da tela inicial com botões personalizados.
Извлекает информацию из Вашего меню "Избранное" и отображает дополнительные кнопки в главном меню и подменю.
Hämtar objekt från dina Kodi-favoriter för att fylla ut hem-menyn med egna knappar.
